evals.name: task-manager
evals.prompt: Build a task management page for a React app. It should fetch tasks from a REST API (`/api/tasks`), let users create new tasks, mark them complete, and filter by status (all/active/completed). Use TypeScript. Include the Zustand store, API hooks, and the page component.
evals.expected_output: React components with proper state colocation: TanStack Query for server data, Zustand for UI state (filters), selectors not bare stores, mutation invalidation

evals.name: shopping-cart
evals.prompt: I need a shopping cart feature for my React e-commerce app. Show a product grid that fetches from `/api/products` with category filtering, an add-to-cart button on each product, and a cart sidebar showing items with quantity controls and a total. TypeScript, include stores and hooks.
evals.expected_output: Cart state in Zustand with selectors, product data via TanStack Query, derived total computed in selector, proper error boundaries

evals.name: dashboard-notifications
evals.prompt: Create a dashboard page that shows user statistics fetched from `/api/stats`, has a tabbed layout (overview/analytics/settings) where the active tab is in the URL, and a notification system where toasts can be triggered from anywhere in the app. React + TypeScript.
evals.expected_output: Stats via TanStack Query, notifications in Zustand, tab state from URL/router params, not all state dumped into one store
